Rank 1.Task: Have a Jack Frost with Mabufu (Lv 11 for Fusion)
Rank 1.Guide: Jack Frost learns Mabufu at Lv 12 OR Arsene + Agathion = Succubus -> Succubus + Pixie = Cait Sith -> Cait Sith + Regent (Mabufu) = Jack Frost

Rank 2.Task: Have an Ame-no-Uzume with Frei (Lv 16 for Fusion)
Rank 2.Guide: Hua Po + Berith = Suzaku -> Berith + Suzaku (Frei) = Ame no Uzume

Rank 3.Task: Have a Flauros with Tarukaja (Lv 19 for Fusion)
Rank 3.Guide: Berith + Regent = Orobas -> Jack-o'-Lantern + Angel = Eligor -> Berith + Orobas + Eligor (Tarukaja) = Flauros

Rank 4.Task: Have a Phoenix with Counter (Lv 21 for Fusion)
Rank 4.Guide: Hua Po + Jack-o'-Lantern = Yaksini -> Kodama + Flauros = Oni -> Yaksini (Counter) + Oni (Counter) = Phoenix

Rank 5.Task: Have a Setanta with Rakukaja (Lv 25 for Fusion)
Rank 5.Guide: Jack-o'-Lantern + Agathion = Silky -> Suzaku + Kaguya Picaro = Lamia -> Silky + Lamia (Rakukaja) = Setanta OR Berith (Rakukaja) + Hua Po = Suzaku (Rakukaja) -> Suzaku (Rakukaja) + Phoenix = Setanta

Rank 6.Task: Have a Neko Shogun with Dekaja (Lv 30 for Fusion)
Rank 6.Guide: High Pixie + Orobas (Dekaja) = Sudama (Dekaja) -> Flauros + Ariadne = Anzu (Also learns Dekaja at Lv 28) -> Kodama + Anzu + Sudama (Dekaja) = Neko Shogun

Rank 7.Task: Have a Lachesis with Tetraja (Lv 35 for Fusion)
Rank 7.Guide: Ariadne + Jack Frost = Principality -> Pixie + Principality (Tetraja) = Anubis (Tetraja) -> Tam Lin + Anubis (Tetraja) = Lachesis OR Clotho learns Tetraja at Lv 28 -> Clotho (Tetraja) + Stone of Scone = Lachesis

Rank 8.Task: Have a Hecatoncheires with Masukunda (Lv 42 for Fusion)
Rank 8.Guide: Hua Po + Thoth (Masukunda) = Andras (Masukunda) -> Anzu + Andras (Masukunda) = Hecatoncheires OR Lilim learns Masukunda at Lv 34 -> Lilim (Masukunda) + Anzu = Hecatoncheires

Rank 9.Task: Have a Bugs with Samarecarm (Lv 49 for Fusion)
Rank 9.Guide: Requires Completing "The Lovesick Cyberstalking Girl" Request (Given on July 10). Hariti learns Samarecarm at Lv 41. Izanagi Picaro + Oni = Pisaca OR Sandman + Orobas = Pisaca. Pixie + Pisaca + Hariti (Samarecarm) = Bugs

Rank 10.Task: Have a Seth with High Counter (Lv 51 for Fusion)
Rank 10.Guide: Bicorn + Kaguya Picaro (High Counter) = Isis (High Counter) -> Anubis + Thoth + Horus + Isis (High Counter) = Seth OR Dakini learns High Counter at Lv 52 -> Dakini (High Counter) + Ame-no-Uzume = Anubis (High Counter) -> Anubis (High Counter) + Thoth + Horus + Isis = Seth
